title: thewatcher.jar
description: Hello! I'm watching you! Here I am!
body:
if you are reading this on unsafe sites the file is stolen and sometimes is not secure
OFFICIAL MOD IS ON CURSEFORGE AND MODRITH

THE MOD DOES NOT ADD 1 ENTITY. THERE ARE MANY ENTITIES.


THIS MOD IS NOT A DWELLER MOD

                    LORE:

Day 1:

-Ducky_minecrafter joined a vanilla world without mods

-He got wooden tools

-He built a house

-He got wool from sheeps.

Day 2:

-Account671 joined the game (it was a soul)

-Ducky_minecrafter created stone tools

-He found iron and coal

-He saw Account671

-He created a furnace and escaped underground

Day 3:

-He built a farm

-He maked a tunnel

-He tried to make a cobblestone portal

-Ducky_minecrafter saw a black player with his big white eye

-He wrote a book

-The player saw a file on his computer

Day 4:

-He opened it and found his Operating System and his username

-His game is crashed

-He noticed a message in russian

-His house dissapeared

Day 5:

-Ducky_minecrafter hurt the entity with one eye

-The entity killed him

-The player ended his vanilla.

-At evening Ducky_minecrafter was assassined in real life

the end of the lore

 

 

DISCLAIMER:

THIS MOD CONTAINS FLASHING LIGHTS NOT FOR EPILEPSY

IT DOESNT INTERACT WITH YOUR PC

IT'S NOT A DWELLER MOD.
